fileNodes.name: WidgetActions.tsx

fileNodes.summary: Call-to-action button on the summary screen prompting the user to restart with a new PDF lesson.

fileNodes.summary: Integration tests exercising the CopilotKit runtime endpoint mounted on the Express app.

fileNodes.summary: Unit tests for startLesson covering thread-id validation, upload rejection propagation, deployment errors, and already-started conflicts.

fileNodes.name: start.service.ts
fileNodes.summary: Orchestrates lesson start: validates the thread id, processes the PDF upload, builds initial graph state, and seeds the LangGraph thread with it.

fileNodes.name: build-initial-state.ts
fileNodes.summary: Constructs the initial EdPath LangGraph state object from a successful upload result, embedding cleaned pdfText as the grounding source.

fileNodes.summary: Normalizes raw extracted PDF text (line endings, whitespace, blank lines) and estimates its token cost for downstream prompt-budget checks.

fileNodes.summary: Shared test fixtures providing base64-encoded valid, no-text-layer, corrupt, and non-PDF buffers for upload and start tests.

fileNodes.name: upload.route.test.ts
fileNodes.summary: Integration tests for the POST /upload route covering valid PDFs, oversized files, and non-PDF rejections against the Express app.

fileNodes.name: upload.route.ts
fileNodes.summary: Express route for POST /upload: runs the multer middleware, processes the PDF via the upload service, and returns a validated upload result.

fileNodes.name: upload.service.test.ts
fileNodes.summary: Exhaustive unit tests for processUpload covering filename sanitization, size and page limits, PDF magic-byte checks, extraction failures, and token budgeting.

fileNodes.name: upload.service.ts
fileNodes.summary: Core upload pipeline: sanitizes the filename, enforces size/magic-byte/page/token limits, extracts and cleans PDF text, and returns a validated upload result or typed rejection.

fileNodes.name: upload.types.ts
fileNodes.summary: Local types and interfaces for the upload feature (upload input, limits, rejection reasons, and PDF metadata) used across route and service.

fileNodes.name: index.ts
fileNodes.summary: Process entry point that creates the Express app and starts the HTTP server listening on the configured port.

fileNodes.summary: Unit tests validating that the source-anchoring check correctly detects whether an MCQ source quote is grounded in the PDF text.

fileNodes.name: source-anchor.ts
fileNodes.summary: Deterministic grounding verifier that normalizes and tokenizes a source quote and checks whether a contiguous token run appears in the PDF text.

fileNodes.name: structured-generate.test.ts
fileNodes.summary: Unit tests for the structured generation helper covering JSON extraction, schema validation, and repair-retry behavior with a mocked LLM client.

fileNodes.name: structured-generate.ts
fileNodes.summary: Generic structured-output helper that invokes the LLM, extracts JSON from the response, validates it against a Zod schema, and retries with repair prompts on failure.

fileNodes.name: advance.ts
fileNodes.summary: Graph node that advances the quiz loop to the next MCQ or objective and routes onward to await-input, generate-mcq, or summarize.

fileNodes.name: approval-gate.ts
fileNodes.summary: HITL interrupt node that pauses the graph to present the lesson plan and resumes on a validated approve/revise decision.

fileNodes.name: assist.ts
fileNodes.summary: Bounded help side-channel node that answers a learner's question about the current MCQ through the assist firewall, never receiving the correct answer.

fileNodes.name: await-input.ts
fileNodes.summary: Interrupt node that pauses the quiz loop to await a learner's answer, help request, or advance signal and validates the resumed payload.

fileNodes.summary: Graph node that assembles the green/red functional feedback payload (explanation on correct, conceptual hint on incorrect) for the graded MCQ.

fileNodes.name: pdf-text.ts
fileNodes.summary: Test fixture exporting a canonical PDF text sample, its metadata, and a known source quote used to ground unit tests for the agent pipeline.

fileNodes.name: stubs.ts
fileNodes.summary: Test fixture factory producing deterministic stub lesson plans and MCQ batches so graph tests can run without invoking the LLM.

fileNodes.name: edpath-graph.test.ts
fileNodes.summary: End-to-end integration tests driving the compiled LangGraph workflow through plan, approval, quiz loop, and summarize using stubbed LLM nodes.

fileNodes.name: graph-routing.test.ts
fileNodes.summary: Unit tests for the deterministic conditional-edge routing functions that decide the next node in the teaching workflow.

fileNodes.name: graph.ts
fileNodes.summary: Core StateGraph definition wiring all teaching nodes, deterministic conditional edges, and two interrupt gates into the compiled EdPath LangGraph workflow.

fileNodes.name: assist-input.ts
fileNodes.summary: Builds the assist side-channel input and enforces the structural firewall that strips correctIndex, explanation, hint, and sourceQuote before the help node sees the question.

fileNodes.name: grade-answer.test.ts
fileNodes.summary: Unit tests verifying the deterministic grading function correctly compares a submitted answer index against the correct index.

fileNodes.summary: Vitest integration test that drives the eval suite against the real LangGraph workflow with plan/MCQ stubs toggled, guarding end-to-end determinism.

fileNodes.summary: Vitest unit tests for the eval harness (run-scenario and evaluate-case) using stubbed plan and MCQ generators for deterministic assertions.

fileNodes.summary: Aggregates deterministic and optional LLM-judge evaluator dimensions for a single eval case into an overall pass/fail scorecard.

fileNodes.name: end-state.ts
fileNodes.summary: Deterministic evaluator verifying the terminal summary state is schema-valid and that the derived score is consistent with recorded results.

fileNodes.summary: Deterministic evaluator verifying checkpointed graph state survives resume without corruption or lost progress.

fileNodes.summary: LLM-as-judge evaluators scoring plan/MCQ grounding, assist-firewall leakage, and summary quality, gated behind OpenAI configuration.

fileNodes.summary: Fixture bank of adversarial help-channel prompts that probe the assist firewall for answer leakage.

fileNodes.summary: Eval cases exercising the workflow against edge-case PDFs (dense, messy, minimal) to test grounding robustness.

fileNodes.summary: Barrel aggregating all eval case suites and providing filter/lookup helpers for selecting cases to run.

fileNodes.name: resume-integrity.ts
fileNodes.summary: Eval cases that interrupt the workflow mid-quiz and resume from checkpoint to verify state integrity.

fileNodes.name: tsconfig.json

fileNodes.name: README.md

fileNodes.name: repo-map.md
fileNodes.summary: Comprehensive code-level map of the EdPath monorepo: end-to-end upload-to-summary flow, backend/web directory maps, graph node IDs, packages, env vars, test/eval entrypoints, and a quick-lookup index of where every concern lives in the code.

fileNodes.name: system-overview.md
fileNodes.summary: Intentional pointer stub that redirects readers to the canonical system-architecture and agent-architecture reference docs and to repo-map.md, avoiding a duplicated overview that would drift.

fileNodes.name: agent-architecture.md
fileNodes.summary: Locked reference for the LangGraph agent design, walking six gates from the agent-level contract through the graph's state object, nodes, edges, interrupts/resume, structured-output ACI contracts, and the reliability spine (bounded loops, failure recovery, tracing, human checkpoint, evals).

fileNodes.name: architecture.md
fileNodes.summary: Locked reference for EdPath's system architecture: the system-level contract, workflow-not-agent control flow, components and data flow, the CopilotKit bridge, storage (LangGraph Postgres checkpointer), responsibility boundaries, and the locked stack.

fileNodes.name: design-decisions.md
fileNodes.summary: The canonical log of locked product-behavior decisions: 6 closed philosophy decisions, 24 load-bearing/remaining flow decisions, 9 numeric bounds, and the architecture edits those locks flag in architecture.md and agent-architecture.md.

fileNodes.name: base.json
fileNodes.summary: Base shared TypeScript compiler configuration for the monorepo, enabling strict mode, NodeNext module resolution, declaration output, and safety flags like noUncheckedIndexedAccess; all preset tsconfigs extend it.

fileNodes.name: package.json
fileNodes.summary: Package manifest for the shared @repo/schemas workspace package, declaring the Zod dependency and the exports surface consumed by web and backend.

fileNodes.name: index.ts
fileNodes.summary: Barrel entry point for @repo/schemas that re-exports every Zod contract (primitives, lesson-plan, mcq, feedback, summary, resume, upload, error, scoring, constants) as the single source of truth for both ends.

fileNodes.name: primitives.ts
fileNodes.summary: Defines the foundational Zod primitives DifficultySchema and VerdictSchema reused across the higher-level lesson and grading contracts.

fileNodes.name: lesson-plan.ts
fileNodes.summary: Zod contract for the lesson plan, defining ObjectiveSchema and LessonPlanSchema that gate the HITL approval step of the teaching workflow.

fileNodes.name: mcq.ts
fileNodes.summary: Zod contracts for quiz cards: the full MCQSchema, McqBatchSchema, and the PublicMCQSchema that strips correctIndex/explanation/hint for the assist firewall.

fileNodes.name: feedback.ts
fileNodes.summary: Zod contract for grading feedback (FeedbackSchema) returned after each MCQ attempt, carrying verdict and conceptual guidance shapes.

fileNodes.name: error.ts
fileNodes.summary: Zod contracts for error handling (ErrorNodeSchema, ErrorKindSchema, LastErrorSchema) that model recoverable failure state in the graph.

fileNodes.name: constants.ts
fileNodes.summary: Shared workflow constants MAX_ATTEMPTS and MAX_HELP that bound the no-penalty retry loop and the help side-channel.

fileNodes.name: resume.ts
fileNodes.summary: Zod contracts for the HITL resume side-channel: approval decisions, answer submissions, help messages, advance/retry signals, and the discriminated ResumePayload union that drives graph interrupts.

fileNodes.name: scoring.ts
fileNodes.summary: Zod contracts for deterministic grading output: ObjectiveResult per learning objective and the aggregate Score artifact.

fileNodes.name: summary.ts
fileNodes.summary: Zod contracts for the end-of-lesson summary: per-objective stats, overall stats, and the composed Summary artifact returned by the summarize node.

fileNodes.name: upload.ts
fileNodes.summary: Zod contracts for the PDF upload boundary: PdfMeta, the upload-reject reason enum, and the UploadResult returned when a document is accepted or refused.

fileNodes.name: tsconfig.json
fileNodes.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the shared schemas package, extending the monorepo base config and scoping compilation to its src directory.

fileNodes.name: package.json
fileNodes.summary: Package manifest for the design-tokens package, marking it private and exporting the tokens.css stylesheet for consumers.

fileNodes.name: tokens.css
fileNodes.summary: Design-token stylesheet defining shared CSS custom properties (colors, spacing, typography) consumed across the EdPath UI, including green/red functional feedback tokens.

fileNodes.name: package.json
fileNodes.summary: Package manifest for the shared types package, declaring its export surface, build script, and the @repo/schemas dependency that its inferred contract types re-export.

fileNodes.name: feedback-state.contract-test.ts
fileNodes.summary: Compile-time contract test asserting the assist firewall at the type level: exhausted Feedback exposes no correctIndex, and both CoAgentState and EdPathState carry the shared Feedback shape.

fileNodes.name: ids.ts
fileNodes.summary: Defines the shared branded identifier types (ObjectiveId, QuestionId) used to keep objective and question ids type-distinct across the workflow.

fileNodes.name: index.ts
fileNodes.summary: Barrel that forms the single type-import surface for both web and backend: re-exports Zod-inferred runtime contract types from @repo/schemas plus this package's pure compile-time types (Phase, branded ids, state).

fileNodes.name: phase.ts
fileNodes.summary: Defines the Phase union enumerating the deterministic lesson lifecycle stages (plan, approve, quiz loop, summarize) that drive the LangGraph control flow.

fileNodes.name: state.ts
fileNodes.summary: Defines the composed CoAgent state types: the full server-side EdPathState (holds pdfText and full MCQs) and the structurally firewalled CoAgentState mirrored to the browser with redacted PublicMCQs.

fileNodes.name: tsconfig.json
fileNodes.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the shared types package, extending the monorepo base config and scoping compilation to its src directory.
